entity.summary: Community-supported network of decentralized exchanges with shared frontend interfaces, AMM liquidity pools, token swaps, liquidity provision, routing to external liquidity, analytics, and yield integrations.
entity.notes: Current first-party homepage and application remain reachable. First-party 1Hive documentation models Honeyswap as a network of community-supported DEX deployments with common frontends, liquidity pools, trade routing, analytics, and related DeFi integrations.

evidence.title: Honeyswap official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website identifies Honeyswap as a decentralized exchange, links the live application, and documents trading, liquidity-pool, yield-farming, analytics, and bridge-related user flows.

evidence.title: Honeyswap documentation
evidence.notes: First-party community documentation describes Honeyswap as a network of decentralized exchanges maintained by 1Hive, with liquidity-pool contracts on supported EVM-compatible chains, shared frontends, routing, analytics, and non-upgradeable AMM contracts.

evidence.title: Honeyswap Liquidity Pool guide
evidence.notes: First-party user guide documents active wallet connection, swaps, pool liquidity deposits, supply confirmation, LP position management, withdrawals, and analytics usage.
